notes: Curated successful workflow code references. Use as guidance and re-validate for each run.

items.title: Fuding daily NTL animation with georeferenced scale bar
quality_notes: Uses unified brightness range across all frames
Scale bar computed from georeferenced bounds (not fixed literal)
North arrow explicitly marked as north-up georeference indicator

items.title: Official VJ102/VJ103 full chain for Iran
quality_notes: Runs query-download-preprocess in one callable tool.
Radiance scaled by 1e9 for nW/cm^2/sr consistency.

items.title: VJ102/VJ103 preprocess-only flow with storage-manager paths
quality_notes: Uses /data/processed virtual paths resolved by storage_manager.
Keeps output under thread-scoped workspace outputs.

items.title: Iran conflict assessment with official VJ102/VJ103 + INSS + report rebuild
quality_notes: Chains official fullchain preprocessing, strike refresh, and report rebuild.
Keeps official-source raster preprocessing and event-point refresh decoupled.
Provides reproducible event-window outputs for report regeneration.

items.title: Iran VJ146A1 strict QA workflow for Tehran and Hormuz local-topic maps
quality_notes: Keeps VJ146A1 qa_mode selection in the formal fullchain tool.
Stores Tehran and Hormuz case presets in the workflow layer instead of generic tools.
Uses white_viridis style with CartoDB.Positron for white basemap topic maps.
